author: m.kalinin
content: this was coming from my side. it is strictly EMPTY or FULL and not NOT PENDING. to read the latter you need to keep in mind all other statuses as well, and when you add a new status then you have to check each place where `!= PENDING` and adjust it accordingly. This particular line attempts for the spec correctness rather than software engineering principles

author: m.kalinin
content: sorry guys, i am OOO till mid of the next week, slow on any discussions

author: m.kalinin
content: there was no semantics change and i announced that PR in the <#874767108809031740>, ppl might have missed it tho

author: m.kalinin
content: on a similar note i would prefer `if store.blocks[head.root].slot + 1 < get_current_slot(store):` in favor of `if store.blocks[head.root].slot + 1 != get_current_slot(store):`. The latter makes reader also reason about `if store.blocks[head.root].slot + 1 > get_current_slot(store)` case which we all know is impossible but that impossibility is enforced in a different place of the FC spec. The former would be self-contained in that regard
